title: eryngium subinerme
intro: Eryngium subinerme, also known as the Dwarf Sea Holly, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Eryngium subinerme include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health. Eryngium subinerme can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
